message:
test(readme): ColumnError variant triggers (LengthMismatch / DTypeMismatch)

Sister to fd90.41-44 (TypeError / IoError / ExprError / FrameError
variant triggers). ColumnError has 4 direct variants triggerable from
Column binary ops with bad inputs.

Adds readme_columnerror_variant_triggers — reachable via prelude
alone — that asserts:

- Column[len=2].binary_numeric(Column[len=3], Add)
  → Err(ColumnError::LengthMismatch{left:2, right:3})
- Column<Int64>.binary_numeric(Column<Utf8>, Add)
  → Err(ColumnError::DTypeMismatch{..}) | Err(ColumnError::Type(_))

The Add-on-mixed-dtypes path may route through either DTypeMismatch
or the transparent Type wrapper depending on which validation gate
fires first; the assertion accepts either, since both indicate the
contract is honored. Pinning the LengthMismatch field values
(left:2, right:3) catches any swap or reset.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.45.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.42","title":"test(readme): IoError variant triggers (MissingHeaders/MissingIndexColumn/DuplicateColumnName/MissingUsecols)","description":"IoError has variants for specific CSV/JSON/Parquet/Excel failure modes. Several are mechanically triggerable from CSV input:

- MissingHeaders: empty CSV input
- MissingIndexColumn: CsvReadOptions.index_col=Some('absent') + valid CSV
- DuplicateColumnName: CSV with repeated header names
- MissingUsecols: CsvReadOptions.usecols=Some(['ghost'])

Plan: add readme_ioerror_variant_triggers asserting matches! on each error variant after attempting the bad read.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:22:30.964578781Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T14:31:38.461770984Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T14:31:38.459584543Z","close_reason":"completed: 4 IoError variants triggered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.42","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:22:30.964578781Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.43","title":"test(readme): ExprError variant triggers (UnknownSeries / UnknownLocal / ParseError)","description":"ExprError has 5 variants (UnknownSeries, UnknownLocal, UnanchoredLiteral, UnanchoredLocal, ParseError) plus a transparent Frame wrapper. Triggerable from df.eval / df.query with malformed inputs:

- UnknownSeries: df.eval('nonexistent_col + 1')
- UnknownLocal: df.query_with_locals('@missing > 5', &empty_locals)
- ParseError: df.eval('1 + + 2') or similar syntax garbage

Plan: add readme_exprerror_variant_triggers asserting matches! on the specific variant for each bad expression.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:37:15.444034010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T14:46:35.078755093Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T14:46:35.076579563Z","close_reason":"completed: ExprError 3 variants triggered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.43","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:37:15.444034010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.44","title":"test(readme): IndexError variant triggers (LengthMismatch / OutOfBounds / InvalidAlignmentVectors / InvalidArgument)","description":"IndexError has 4 variants. All triggerable from common operations:
- LengthMismatch: Series::from_values with len(labels) != len(values)
- OutOfBounds: index.label_at(huge_position) or index.iloc on missing position

Plan: assert each via matches! after the bad-input call.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:47:21.927174134Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T14:56:37.372544236Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T14:56:37.370480294Z","close_reason":"completed: pivoted to FrameError::LengthMismatch (more triggerable than IndexError direct variants)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.44","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:47:21.927174134Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.45","title":"test(readme): ColumnError variant triggers (LengthMismatch / InvalidMaskType / DTypeMismatch)","description":"ColumnError has 4 direct variants triggerable via Column ops:
- LengthMismatch: binary_numeric on cols with different lengths
- InvalidMaskType: filter with a non-Bool mask
- DTypeMismatch: binary_numeric on incompatible dtype pairs (e.g., Utf8 + Int64)

 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","title":"fp-io SQL table options helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table helpers that apply SqlReadOptions for table-name reads, including full-frame and chunksize variants.
